name: paulkuo.tw
description: Paul Kuo 的個人品牌網站。內容涵蓋 AI 與秩序、循環經濟、文明與人性、創造與實踐、反思與記憶五大支柱。提供文章搜尋、作者資訊查詢、專案作品集瀏覽等 AI 互動功能。

skills.name: Author profile
skills.description: Get Paul Kuo's background, expertise areas, and social profiles

skills.name: Article search
skills.description: Search articles by keyword or content pillar, with limit control

skills.name: Expertise and content pillars
skills.description: Browse Paul's five content pillars with optional article listings per pillar

skills.name: Project portfolio
skills.description: View Paul's active projects and tools including Agora Plaza and CircleFlow

skills.name: Contact
skills.description: Get Paul's contact information and open email
